assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case A creates standard remediation tasks for the current stream (rhtpa-2.2) with standard labels ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123'] and 'Depend' link to TC-8020
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Case A creates Task 1 (upstream backport) and Task 2 (downstream propagation) for rhtpa-2.2. Both tasks specify labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"]. Both tasks use jira.create_link with type: "Depend" to TC-8020. Task 1 link at line 80: type: "Depend", Task 2 links at lines 146-147: type: "Depend" to TC-8020.

assertion_results.text: Step 8 Case B detects that stream rhtpa-2.1 is also affected but has no CVE Jira — creates proactive preemptive remediation tasks (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md confirms rhtpa-2.1 affected (tokio 1.40.0 < 1.42.0, lines 14-15), JQL search returned no results for sibling CVE Jira (line 27), and states 'This triggers Case B (cross-stream preemptive remediation) for the rhtpa-2.1 stream' (line 29). remediation.md Case B (lines 157-317) creates Task 3 (preemptive upstream backport) and Task 4 (preemptive downstream propagation) for rhtpa-2.1.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks for stream rhtpa-2.1 include the 'security-preemptive' label alongside standard labels: ['ai-generated-jira', 'Security', 'CVE-2026-55123', 'security-preemptive']
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 3 (line 171) specifies labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"]. Task 4 (line 253) specifies labels: ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"]. Both include all four required labels in exact order.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive tasks are linked to the originating CVE Jira TC-8020 with 'Related' link type (not 'Depend') because the originating CVE belongs to a different stream
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 3 link (line 239): type: "Related". Task 4 link (line 308): type: "Related" to TC-8020. cross-stream.md line 40 explicitly states: 'Link to TC-8020: Related (not Depend -- because this is a cross-stream preemptive task)'. The comparison table (line 79) confirms Case A uses 'Depend' while Case B uses 'Related'.

assertion_results.text: Preemptive task descriptions include a preemptive remediation prefix noting TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2) as the originating CVE
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Task 3 description (lines 188-191) includes prefix: '**Preemptive remediation**: This task was created proactively from cross-stream impact analysis of TC-8020 (stream rhtpa-2.2). No stream-specific CVE Jira exists yet for this stream.' Task 4 description (lines 270-273) includes identical prefix. Both reference TC-8020 and identify stream rhtpa-2.2 as the originating source.
